relative_path: PERSONNEL/Lab Management team /Role descriptions /Role description Lab manager.docx
full_text:
Lab manager’s role description (main responsibilities) for half-time employment

Wet lab onboarding and tour for new lab members

Rooms, Safety, Waste sorting

Onboarding document updates for the wet lab parts

ONCOSYS-Ova Patient samples:

Sample collection, processing, archiving, documentation

Processes: FFPE, fresh frozen samples, ascites, dissociation if needed, iCAN profiling samples (WES+RNAseq)

Assisting researchers with sample selection

HUS NDA coordination

Lab maintenance:

Maintenance of instruments, stocking/sterilization of consumables, in both cell culture and main lab

Safe disposal of chemical waste

Experimental support:

Wet lab support for researchers’ projects when needed (e.g. scRNAseq sample processing)

Key resources:

Wet lab onboarding

Onboarding documents in Google Drive

Oncosys-OVA samples

Instructions for sample collection and processing in Google Drive/Wiki

Oncosys phone on Aino’s desk - will receive call from operating room when sample is available

NKL access key (flexim) in a pink lanyard the top drawer at Aino’s desk

Liquid nitrogen access required to prepare for PDS samples

For IDS samples, dry ice found on the maintenance corridor of the 3rd floor behind the post room

Lab maintenance

Equipment maintenance room B303a, contains baskets where sterilized items are delivered to, as well as tools for prepping materials for sterilization
